entries.text:
2026-06-03:
- In theory, the number of learners will be automatically updated in the table once a week. In the "learners" section, it's already updated daily.
- No news about "English from..." new courses.

2026-05-31:
- Added Math from English, Chess from English and Chess from Spanish

2026-05-25:
 News coming from Tony K:
- Small change in Hindi from English: Duolingo has removed the first 4 units, "Pair letters and sounds"

2026-05-23:
- Many courses have (more) stories and more radios. Slowly updating the table...
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-05-09:
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-04-19:
- I will be traveling from 04-20 to 05-12. I will try to update the table if Duolingo makes any important changes.

2026-04-18:
- Entries for the "from Indonesian" and "from Turkish" have been updated in the table.
- Slowly filling the table with new expansions' data
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-04-14:
- Since 2026/04/01, Klingon is available again (from EN)
- Entries for the "from Ukrainian, from Russian" have been updated in the table.
- Slowly filling the table with new expansions' data
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-04-09:
- Entries for the "from Italian, from German, and from Vietnamese" have been updated in the table.
- Slowly filling the table with new expansions' data
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-04-03:
- On the "Number of learners" subpage, there's a new option to select courses "... from all languages"
 Thanks to Jos Foe for that cool idea!

2026-04-02:
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-04-01:
- Entries for the "from Japanese" and "from Korean" courses have been updated.
- Slowly filling the table with new expansions' data
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-03-31:
- I've slightly updated the "learner's chart" so now it shows exact numbers instead of rounded ones.
- Slowly filling the table with new expansions' data
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-03-30:
- Chinese B2 available from all languages (not A/B anymore), except from BN, HI, TA, TE.
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-03-29:
- Just a note: There are several course versions on iOS that multiply the number of units by 3, 4, or 5 in the first sections.
 These are not reflected in the table for two reasons:
 1) They are very rare (at least for now), and
 2) I don't have any Apple device.
- "Number of learners" updated

2026-03-26:
- Portuguese B2 from English available to all users (not A/B anymore)

2026-03-25:
- Portuguese B2 available from all languages (not A/B anymore), except from EN & BN, HI, TA, TE.
- "Number of learners" updated!

2026-03-23:
- German B2 available from all languages (not A/B anymore), except from EN & TL, TA, TE.
- Slowly filling the table with new expansions' data
- Rebuilding the old courses table, with all previous versions of all courses (under construction).

2026-03-21:
- EN from PT has more stories and radios (table updated!)
 thanks to Legoshi_beastar for pointing it out!

2026-03-19:
- Chinese B2 available from all languages (including EN) as A/B (1030 units) (except from BN, HI, TA, TE)

2026-03-18:
 News coming from Tony K:
- Japanese B2 available from all languages (not A/B anymore), except from EN & BN, TA, TE.
- Korean B2 available from all languages (including EN) as A/B (1031 units) (except from BN, HI, TA, TE)
- Moved to old table:
 Italian and Japanese A2/B1.

2026-03-17:
 News coming from Tony K:
- Italian B2 available from all languages (not A/B anymore), except from EN & BN, HI, TA, TE.

2026-03-13:
- Portuguese B2 available from all languages (including EN) as A/B (1031 units) (except from BN, HI, TA, TE)

2026-03-07:
- Japanese B2 available from all languages (including EN) as A/B (1030 units) (except BN, TA, TE)

2026-03-06:
- Added the new DE, IT and JA from EN B2 course entries (1030  units)

2026-03-05:
- Japanese B2 from English available as A/B (1030 units)
- German B2 available from all languages (including EN) as A/B (1030 units)

2026-03-04:
- Italian B2 available from all languages (including EN) as A/B (1030 units) (except BN)

2026-03-01:
- Typo corrected: Year was incorrect in release date for Korean B1 (it said 25.02 when it should be 26.02).
 Many thanks to Bashir Ahmad for pointing it out!

2026-02-27:
- Added the new FR and ES from EN B2 course entries (994 and 991 units)
- Chess, Math, and Music have been removed from the table, as the course details had not yet been published and it's currently impossible for me to provide them
- Rebuilding the old courses table, with all previous versions of all courses (under construction).

2026-02-25:
- Korean B2 from all languages is now under development, progressing very quickly thanks to AI tools.

2026-02-24:
- Spanish and French from English have been replaced by new AI versions:
 Now ES is 10+31+30+60+250+250+180+180 and FR is 10+30+29+60+255+245+180+185.
 The same will happen with German, Italian, and Japanese (from English).
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since 2025 June 23).

2026-02-18:
- Japanese B1 from BN, HI, TA, TE available as A/B
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since 2025 June 23).

2026-02-17:
- Korean 630 units B1 available (not A/B anymore) from all languages except BN, HI, TA, TE
- Moved to "old 2024-26" table:
 KO from all 130 A2

2026-02-14:
- Japanese B1 available (not A/B anymore) from all languages except BN, HI, TA, TE
- Moved to "old 2024-25" table:
 JA from all 130 A2

2026-02-10:
- Chinese B1 available (not A/B anymore) from all languages except BN, HI, TA, TE
- PlayerVsPlayer available to all in Chess (Android & iOS)
- Number of Stories and Radios updated in almost all core courses.
- Moved to "old 2024-25" table:
 ZH from all 130 A2

2026-02-09:
- Correction: B1 ZH, JA & KO are NOT yet available A/B, from BN, HI, TA, TE.
- Correction: The new German B1 from English is NOT yet available as A/B.
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since 2025 June 23).

2026-02-04:
- Korean B1 available from all languages as A/B (before as predicted)
- German B1 available (not A/B anymore) from all languages except English (Still A/B)
- Moved to "old 2024-25" table:
 DE from all 130 A2

2026-01-31:
- Japanese B1 available from all languages as A/B (before as predicted)
 Now, the expected release dates change slightly:
 Italian and Portuguese B1: second half of February
 Korean B1: first half of March
 German B2: second half of March
 Italian and Portuguese B2: first half of April 2026
 Chinese, Japanese, Korean B2: second half of April 2026

2026-01-29:
- Chinese B1 available from all languages as A/B (as predicted)
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since 2025/06/23).

2026-01-26:
- It seems that the definitive version of the Italian from English course will be the 130-units one.
 Both versions, the 123-unit and the 130-unit courses, reach A2 level, and Duolingo had not yet decided which one would be final.
 As a result, the older version has been marked in grey in the table.
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since 2025/06/23).

2026-01-23:
- German B1 from English was released due to human error and was not yet finished, so it has been withdrawn.
 Italian B1 is almost complete, as is Japanese B1, but the expected release dates remain unchanged.
- DE from EN 913 is shown in grey in the table until it's officially released.

2026-01-20:
- It seems Duolingo has changed its mind:
 First, B1 will be released, followed later by B2.
 In that case, the expected release dates change slightly:
 Chinese B1: first half of February
 German B2: second half of February
 Italian and Portuguese B1: first half of March
 Japanese, Korean B1: second half of March
 Italian and Portuguese B2: first half of April 2026
 Chinese, Japanese, Korean B2: second half of April 2026

2026-01-19:
 News coming from Tony K:
- German B1 available from many languages as A/B
- Removed from the table: ES B2 from TL, TA, TE, VI and FR from HI, TL, TA, TE, VI (Not expected to be released soon).

2026-01-18:
- Removed the "JSON" files in the "from" column. People who may need it, already know how to extract it directly from Duolingo...
- Estimated release dates:
 German B2: second half of February 2026
 Italian and Portuguese B2: first half of April 2026
 Chinese, Japanese, Korean B2: second half of April 2026
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since 2025/06/23).

2026-01-12:
- Spanish B2 available (no A/B anymore) from all languages except Tagalog, Tamil, Telugu and Vietnamese
- I forgot to mention PT update to B2! It will be updated at same time as Italian.
- Moved to "old 2024-25" table:
 Spanish (A2).

2025-12-29:
 Let's see if Duolingo release something interesting today or this week!
- French B2 available (no A/B anymore) from all languages except Hindi, Tagalog, Tamil, Telugu and Vietnamese
- Moved to "old 2024-25" table:
 English (less than 970 units), French (129), German (156), Spanish (286).

2025-12-18:
- Correction: French B2 is NOT yet available A/B, from HI, TL, TA, TE, VI.
- Correction: Spanish B2 is NOT yet available A/B, from TL, TA, TE, VI.
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since June 23).

2025-12-12:
- Added "Max Score" 2nd column (#)

2025-12-10:
- Filling the table with the new B2 Spanish
- Checking/updating number of Radios, Stories, Lessons...

2025-12-09:
- Spanish B2 available from all languages as A/B
- I'll be adding all data to the table throughout this week.
- "Number of learners" NOT updated by Duolingo (Since June 23).
